# SpartanH2

> SpartanH2 is a southeast Michigan motorcycle content creator with a strong local following. POV rides, group rides, bike nights, and rider culture across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Rumble, X, Facebook, Snapchat, and Discord. Independent creator, community first.

Content reflects personal riding experience. Not a paid dealer or sponsor endorsement unless explicitly stated.

## About

- [Home](https://spartanh2.com/): Central hub with the SpartanH2 identity, links to every platform, and quick access to support and partners

## Content types

- POV motorcycle riding footage from the helmet cam and on bike
- Group ride coverage across southeast Michigan and the wider region
- Bike night footage and local meet coverage
- Rider culture, community moments, and street level storytelling

## Location

- Southeast Michigan, United States

## Platforms

- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SpartanH2): Long form POV rides and group ride edits
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/SpartanH2/): Photos, reels, event clips
- [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@spartan.h2): Short form ride and culture clips
- [Rumble](https://rumble.com/user/SpartanH2): Mirror of YouTube long form
- [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/Spartan_H2): Posts and updates
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61591693924495): Community updates
- [Snapchat](https://www.snapchat.com/add/Spartan_H2): Behind the scenes
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/fz67hjDnPW): Rider community server

## Support

- [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/SpartanH2): Membership and behind the scenes access
- [Crypto direct support](https://spartanh2.com/direct.html): Bitcoin, Monero, and Dogecoin addresses
- [Merch (coming soon)](https://sh2.store): Official SpartanH2 apparel
- [Supporters list](https://spartanh2.com/supporters.html): Public thank you to active supporters

## Partners

- [Partners](https://spartanh2.com/partners.html): Partnered creators and brands

## Contact

- [Contact](https://spartanh2.com/contact.html): Business, brand, and partnership inquiries
